en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Nicaraguan Industrial Hygiene and Safety License in the Nicaragua Hygiene and Safety Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

The MITRAB Certificate of Registration is an official document issued by the Nicaraguan Ministry of Labor (MITRAB) confirming that a company has properly formed and registered its Joint Workplace Health and Safety Committee. The certificate can be obtained directly from the Ministry of Labor (MITRAB). Law No. 618, General Law on Occupational Health and Safety (Art. 7, 41, 48, 50, 52)
Please upload your MITRAB Certificate of Registration.
